title: Marketing Chrome — Header + Footer
description: Config-driven marketing site header + footer that every template currently hand-rolls. MarketingHeader takes brand / nav links / primary + secondary CTAs and renders one of three layouts (split = brand-left/nav-center/cta-right, centered = stacked brand over nav, minimal = brand + cta only) with an optional sticky bar and a Sheet-based mobile menu. MarketingFooter takes brand / link columns / social icons / legal links / copyright and renders either a multi-column link grid with a bottom legal bar (columns) or a single brand-links-social row (slim). Pure UI, prop-only, no Convex.

axes.description: split = brand/nav/cta; centered = stacked brand over nav; minimal = brand + cta only

previews.seed: static brand + 4 nav links + primary/secondary CTA

axes.description: columns = multi-column link grid + legal bar; slim = single brand/links/social row
